description:
Fragment of a Fatimid fiscal account, probably. Two entries are preserved. The phrase "ʿan al-mamʿūl fīhā" is preserved in both. There is a number (433?) in the second preserved line. 

The paper was reused on the recto for piyyūṭ יוצר לשבועות (Information from FGP). MCD.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
